name: learn
description: >- Knowledge compiler. Extracts patterns, decisions, and anti-patterns from completed campaigns and evolve cycles, then compiles them into structured wiki pages that integrate with existing knowledge rather than appending isolated files. Implements flush→compile→lint pipeline. Auto-triggered by /postmortem and /evolve Phase 6.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 它是个知识编译工具，能自动从项目复盘中提取经验和避坑指南，整理成结构化文档融入现有知识库，避免知识碎片化，适合团队复盘和经验沉淀。
